# terrible_community_general_sysrc (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of variable in `/etc/rc.conf` to manage.

### Optional

- `delim` (String) Delimiter to be used instead of `" "` (space). Only used when `state=value_present` or `state=value_absent`.
- `jail` (String) Name or ID of the jail to operate on.
- `path` (String) Path to file to use instead of `/etc/rc.conf`.
- `state` (String) Use `present` to add the variable. Use `absent` to remove the variable. Use `value_present` to add the value to the existing variable. Use `value_absent` to remove the value from the existing variable.
- `value` (String) The value to set when `state=present`. The value to add when `state=value_present`. The value to remove when `state=value_absent`.
